purpose: Close the remaining malformed-query bypass in the OAuth start destination validator.
success_outcome: Only structurally valid legitimate OAuth queries pass on exact approved provider paths.
anti_goals: Do not broaden provider origins or paths.
Do not change backend provider exchange.
Do not weaken prior TASK-030 fixes.

success_checks: Malformed raw query syntax and dangerous decoded keys fail closed.

stop_conditions: A bounded raw-query parser cannot distinguish legitimate and malformed input.
The fix requires broadening approved destinations.
required_handoff: Report changed_files, commands_run, evidence, scope_compliance, and blockers_or_none.
